name: Small Window
description: You can't see a whole lot

name: Blinds
description: Close the blinds if it's too bright

name: Rustic Window
description: A rustic-style window with a wide view

name: Elegant Window
description: Enjoy the scent of the flowers through this window

name: Woodsy Blues
description: You can get close to the animals.

name: Wishing Window
description: Wishes are so lovely!

name: Classic Round Window
description: It looks like the round faces of classic beauties!

name: Magic Mirror
description: It can interact with you and tell you who is the fairest of them all.

name: Cabin Window
description: Why are there fishes out there?
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Orange-flavored Window
description: The wind that come through smells like oranges.

name: Oriental Lattice Window
description: Little birdies like resting their feet here.

name: Donut Eye
description: Who sneaked a bite from this?

name: Window Rose
description: The breeze brings along a fragrance of roses.

name: Gear Window
description: Whose dreams do the gears decorate?

name: Snowy Scenery
description: There's nothing more pleasant than watching snow from a warm room!

name: Cloudy Daydream
description: What's there up on the clouds? Candy and snacks, of course!

name: Diamond Windows
description: Romance is often hidden within reason.

name: Night Concerto
description: The sounds of cawing crows can occasionally be heard.

name: Spring Snow
description: Which of these snowcapped trees is the real plum tree?

name: Fantasy Daydream
description: Always daydreaming about fantasy worlds that may lie beyond your window.

name: Breezy Fields
description: The wind tastes of freedom.

name: Budding Window
description: The glass of the window was made using caramel!

name: Heartbeat Creed
description: There's a purple filter when you look out at the world from here.

name: Prophetic View
description: Gently part each veiled layer to look further into the future.

name: First Snow Lookout
description: Will the first winter snowflake pass by here?

name: Bellflower Forest
description: The bunches of bellflowers look almost dreamlike.

name: Romantic Window
description: A portal to frequent unexpected visitors.

name: Fairytale Window
description: Look!There's a dreamlike castle outside.

name: Mini Theater Window
description: Just look out the window to see the beautiful scenery of fall and winter.

name: Summer Breeze
description: The wind blows so softly, just like grandma's palm-leaf fan.

name: Snowy Gate
description: It's a snowy night... Do you want to build a snowman?

name: Mythical Tree Window
description: Enjoy the scent of fresh flowers without stepping outside.

name: Meteoric Round Window
description: One... Two... Wow! Three are so many shooting stars!

name: Stump Bin
description: It can't hold a lot

name: Wicker Basket
description: Just toss things in

name: Fancy Bin
description: A very pretty trash can

name: Modern Trash Can
description: Doesn't release any bad odors

name: Elegant Blues
description: Who would've thought a trash can could be so pretty!

name: Piggy's Help
description: He comes from the backyard to take care of the trash.

name: Gluttonous Tube
description: I hear it's called Tube. I also hear it loves to eat.

name: Wisp
description: A spirit called Wisp. It can help you eat up trash.

name: Puff
description: A spirit called Puff. It can help you eat up trash.

name: Fish Mouth Bin
description: This trash can loves eating rubbish!
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Watermelon Pail
description: A pail from an ancient garden. Vintage!

name: Handicraft Bamboo Basket
description: It still smells of bamboo.

name: Strange Ice Cream
description: It can remove strange odors.

name: Butterfly Strapping
description: Rubbish you put in immediately disappears to somewhere unknown.

name: Boot Barrel
description: Who knows where the other one is hiding...

name: Playful Drum
description: Alright, who turned my drum into a trash can?!

name: Jam Jenga
description: No one has the heart to throw trash into it.

name: Old Brush-Cleaning Bucket
description: The untold efforts of many are recorded within.

name: Colored Glass Barrel
description: This is too precious a thing to be used as a trashcan!

name: Tinkling Cup
description: Melodious tinkling can be heard every time something is dropped into it.

name: Vintage Daisy Bin
description: Has a foot-operated design to free up your hands.

name: Thriving Wilderness
description: The wildflowers have their own little world here.

name: Cheesy Recycling Station
description: Remember to sort your waste!

name: Star-recycling Moment
description: Will the things placed inside turn into stars?

name: Stardust Hourglass
description: Anything that is placed inside this transforms into dissipating stardust. However, please do not throw trash in just for curiosity's sake.

name: Boot Recycling Area
description: Place unwanted items into the snow boot and they'll turn into candies by tomorrow!

name: Mobile Recycling Bin
description: Wheels have been added for greater mobility.

name: White Conch Bin
description: Clear up all of the trash that's floating in the ocean.

name: Floral Holy Grail
description: Abandon your arrows here and wish for peace forevermore.

name: Smart Storage
description: Every item has its own place!Remember to sort them properly.

name: Memory's Echo
description: Toss all terrible memories in here. Hopefully it'll help you feel better.

name: Apple Bin
description: No aim needed to throw trash into this bin.

name: Glass Vessel
description: You almost feel bad throwing trash into it.

name: Famished Dino
description: It only acceps delicious items!

name: Simple Shelf
description: Made with a plank taken from the neighbors' doorplate

name: Standard Shelf
description: Now with space to add two plates!

name: Anti-Bacterial Cupboard
description: Keepin' things clean and safe!

name: Ornate Cupboard
description: Well-suited for storing beautiful dishes

name: Sweet Love
description: Perfect for lovers sharing a meal.

name: Bone Shelf
description: The items stored here are filled with memories.

name: Blue-white Memories
description: These seashells and starfishes were found by the seashore.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Cherry Cupboard
description: Can the cherries be eaten?

name: Sandalwood Cupboard
description: A cabinet made of fine golden sandalwood.

name: Ice Cream Cupboard
description: I love chocolate-covered ice cream best.

name: Rose Cupboard
description: The seeds brought by a little bird bloomed into roses atop the cupboard.

name: Iron Patched Cabinet
description: If the cabinet breaks, don't worry—just patch it up, and it's still usable!

name: Acorn Cupboard
description: A gift from Squirrel, 100% made by paw.

name: Celestial Fantasy
description: I wanna paint the sky with all the things in my imagination.

name: Pigment Cupboard
description: Gold pigments are extremely rare.

name: Inky Days of Old
description: It creaks when you open it.

name: Cabinet of Wonders
description: Filled with all kinds of fine cutlery.

name: Bear Cupboard
description: The little bear keeps its most precious belongings in this cupboard.

name: Lucky Four-Leaf Clover
description: Holds lots of luck. Would you like some?

name: The Waltz of Bread
description: Remember to dry the bowls and plates before storing them!

name: Little Mouse Glass Cabinet
description: You can store a ton of plates in it!

name: Fiery Wings
description: Once these wings are plump and full, it's time to embark on an adventure again.

name: Winter Night's Lullaby
description: Since the snowman isn't afraid of the cold, it wishes to give the scard around its neck to someone who actually needs it.

name: Woof Cupboard
description: The fluffy cupboard protects the cutlery within.

name: Storage Seashell
description: Capable of storing tons of cutlery.

name: Winged Antique Cabinet
description: The wings will protect each and every piece of cutlery.

name: Joyful Unveiling
description: Attention!The little ghosts are about to start their performance.

name: Broken Memories
description: Put your hand on it. What do you feel?

name: Apple Glass Cabinet
description: Huh, the apple core is the cabinet handle?

name: Vernal Vista
description: It can hold your dishes. but not the advent of spring.

name: Celestial Storage
description: Store the stars and the moon over here.

name: Grains
description: Too much dog food is bad for your digestion...

name: Fresh Potatoes
description: A staple food

name: Fine Produce
description: All kinds of fresh fruits and veggies

name: Full Pantry
description: Has everything you need!

name: Coffin Gift
description: We don't know what will appear from inside.

name: Fantasy Carrot
description: An item stored by Mr. Rabbit who carries a pocket watch.

name: Sailor Bucket
description: Made of steel, sturdy and firm.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Orange Box
description: Come replenish your vitamins.

name: Old Enamel Basin
description: A basin that every household seemed to have growing up.

name: Carrot Van
description: Honk honk!Please don't block the way of my little van!

name: Playful Basket
description: It seems to have some magic that keeps the vegetables within fresh.

name: Lace Iron Container
description: There's a hint of artistry in its crudeness.

name: From the Abyss
description: No one knows when the locked entrance was broken open.

name: Mobile Food Basket
description: A super practical food basket that can be used both indoors and outdoors.

name: Prized Drawing Tube
description: Many previously-undiscovered gems can be found within.

name: Rose Realm
description: Food always inexplicably appears inside it...

name: Seasonal Flavors
description: Enjoy all the flavors of the season!

name: Baby Veggie Basket
description: I want to sing a lullaby.

name: Bees' Collection
description: A top-secret delectability that the bees are keeping all to themselves.

name: Exquisite Flour
description: Baking with fine bread flour makes the bread even softer!

name: Rock 'n' Roll Memories
description: Don't prick yourself on the studs.

name: Verdant Flower Basket
description: Bring this flower basket along with you and journey to the great outdoors to soak up some much-needed rays!

name: Sliding Sleigh
description: What ingredients do you need? I'll slide them over to you right away!

name: Bone Guard
description: Identify yourself!If you want a bone, you'll have to pass my inspection first!

name: Deep-sea Treasure
description: Contains wonderful items that were collected from various maritime regions.

name: Tipsy Roses
description: Exudes the faint scent of roses and champagne.

name: Mischievous Box of Fruits
description: Come and help out with the great pumpkin harvest!

name: Chirpy Grain Box
description: All the food were carefully selected by the birds!

name: Snow Kingdom Carriage
description: Filled with the crisp, sweet scent of apples from Snow Kingdom.

name: Spring's Bounty
description: A deligthful treat of juicy oranges and plump pears.

name: Soft Nebula Nest
description: I wonder what will be born within the nebula.

name: Classic Oven
description: It gets the job done

name: Clay Oven
description: Stores heat for quick cooking

name: Fine Oven
description: Good for removing oil and smoke

name: Ornate Oven
description: Drink coffee while you wait

name: Composite Stove
description: It's being modernized and improved!

name: Mutant Stove
description: It shows off otherworldly power.

name: Submarine Stove
description: Repurposed from a submarine.

name: Apple Oven
description: It's super hard. Don't bite it!

name: Large Firewood Stove
description: You can roast a couple of sweet potatoes while burning firewood.

name: Cherry Cake
description: An exclusive oven for cakes.

name: Wonderful Oven
description: Bread baked in this oven always turn out wonderful.

name: Beep-beep Oven
description: An oven starring by the robot Beep-beep.

name: Mini Kingdom
description: How strange. No matter how warm it is, it still snows here!

name: Half-Cooked Palate
description: The cake inside is extremely tempting.

name: Marble Oven
description: Artistic and practical.

name: Eternal Oven
description: Even after a century, it is still working with earnest.

name: Misty Jade
description: The ethereal fog is as if the reflections in my dreams.

name: Small Rotisserie
description: Requires some effort, but the resulting grilled food is delicious beyond compare.

name: Honeypot Over
description: All the food roasted in this oven gives off the sweet aroma of honey.

name: Brick Baking Oven
description: Bread made from a traditional oven sure tastes different.

name: Baking Research
description: A new high-capacity oven model. You can bake 6 small cakes in it in one go!

name: Magic Blast-quet
description: Behind each delicious dish is a hardworking fire-breathing dragon.

name: Christmas Eve Surprise
description: Pull the lever and be surprised with a random treat!

name: Houselet Oven
description: Giving bread the warmth of a home.

name: Spiral Conch Stove
description: The stove's fire can never be extinguished.

name: Fiery Heart
description: This heart burns with the flames of longing.

name: Fairground Oven
description: Although it looks like a watchtower, it's actually an oven!

name: Dawn's Warm Glimmer
description: Good morning. Would you like some delicious toast?

name: Gingerbread Teapot
description: Emits a delightful caramel aroma atop a pile of matches.

name: Spring Steam
description: Don't stick your hands in, you might get burned!

name: Grilled Universe
description: Experience the mysterious heat of the cosmos.

name: Simple Rope
description: If you hang any more it just might snap!

name: Wooden Rack
description: A standard rack

name: Fine Rack
description: Lets you hang more stuff

name: Advanced Rack
description: The best rack around
